title: Anthropic expands Claude's capabilities with agentic functions and Artifacts
summary: The company launches new tools for developers, including Artifacts in Claude Code and improvements in the Claude Design designer.

title: Midjourney surprises with an ultrasound scanner and a spa
summary: The well-known generative AI image company announces a radical diversification into medical hardware and wellness.

title: AI data centers face protests and new regulations in the US
summary: While conservative activists plan protests, the government accelerates grid connection and sets rules for the industry.

title: Jeff Bezos captures media attention with comments on AI, space, and the Washington Post
summary: The Amazon founder talks about labor shortages due to AI, his rocket's failure, and criticizes the management of his newspaper.

title: Autonomous vehicles face a wave of legal challenges
summary: Waymo pulls thousands of taxis due to roadworks, BYD promises to cover damages, and Rivian owners sue over broken promises.

title: Apple warns of price increases on iPhone and MacBook due to rising memory costs
summary: The increase in cost of DRAM and NAND, driven by AI, forces Apple to raise prices on its upcoming devices.

title: Warnings arise about an artificial intelligence bubble
summary: The Bank of Spain and Meta's chief AI scientist, Yann LeCun, warn that the market could be overheating.

title: Valve updates SteamOS and announces massive delays on the Steam Controller
summary: The company launches SteamOS 3.8 with support for Steam Machines while controller deliveries are delayed until 2027 due to high demand.

title: Epic Games criticizes the decline of AAA games and plans to copy Steam features
summary: Epic's CEO talks about the crisis of high-cost video games while announcing a renovation of its store to imitate its competitor.

title: Morale at Meta hits historic lows after layoffs, according to its CTO
summary: Andrew Bosworth states that morale is the worst ever seen at the company, while AI workers rebel against management.

title: Apple allows new app distribution options in Brazil
summary: The company opens its iOS platform to competition in Brazil, complying with the country's regulatory requirements.

title: Peter Thiel's Dialog Club makes news for its controversial secret ranking system
summary: Reports reveal the controversial internal ranking method of the exclusive social club of the tech elite.

title: Zhipu AI releases GLM-5.2, a Chinese model that competes with the best in the West
summary: The language model offers a 1 million token context and outstanding scores in coding, approaching GPT and Claude.

title: Adobe expands its Firefly AI assistants across the Creative Cloud suite
summary: Firefly's generative capabilities come to Photoshop, Illustrator, and other key applications in the Adobe ecosystem.

title: Ukrainian drones revolutionize warfare with precision attacks on bridges
summary: The drone war in Ukraine demonstrates how to destroy strategic targets without massive bombs and how to incentivize operators with points for kills.

title: The Fable 5 AI model generates controversy over the limits of scaling
summary: Sakana AI's new model is seen as a milestone by some, while others point out that the gap with Chinese AI is narrowing thanks to GLM.

title: Microsoft warns of a USB worm that steals cryptocurrency wallets
summary: A new malware campaign uses USB drives and the Tor network to infect systems and extract crypto assets from victims.

title: Orphan and rogue AI agents generate new security risks
summary: Google DeepMind treats its AI agents like problematic employees while experts warn of the danger of unsupervised agents.

title: Spotify launches early ticket sales for its Premium subscribers
summary: The streaming service allows 'superfans' to access ticket purchases for concerts before the general public.

title: Chip geopolitics tighten: EUV lithography in China and manufacturing plans in the US
summary: The US investigates the possible presence of ASML's key technology in China, while Trump assures that Apple will manufacture with Intel.
